steps.title: Read the slope of f(x) directly
steps.content: $f(x) = 2x + 3$ is in slope-intercept form. The slope is the coefficient of $x$: slope $= 2$.

steps.title: Parallel lines share the same slope
steps.content: Line $j$ is parallel to $y = f(x)$, so slope of $j$ $= 2$. That matches the answer — 2 is correct.
